oldVersionNotice.displayName: New node version available: get the latest version with added features from the nodes panel.

teamId.description: Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression

name.description: Channel name as it will appear to the user in Microsoft Teams

includeLinkToWorkflow.description: Whether to append a link to this workflow at the end of the message. This is helpful if you have many workflows sending messages.

makeReply.description: An optional ID of the message you want to reply to

channelId.description: Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression

returnAll.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

limit.description: Max number of results to return

name.description: Channel name as it will appear to the user in Microsoft Teams

assignedTo.description: Who the task should be assigned to. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

bucketId.description: The bucket for the task to belong to. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

dueDateTime.description: Date and time at which the task is due. The Timestamp type represents date and time information using ISO 8601 format and is always in UTC time.

groupId.description: Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression

labels.description: Labels to assign to the task. Choose from the list, or specify IDs using an expression.

percentComplete.description: Percentage of task completion. When set to 100, the task is considered completed.

planId.description: The plan for the task to belong to. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

chatId.description: Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression

mine.description: Only load groups that account is member of
